tasks.label: Aidssist: FastAPI API
tasks.command: set -a; source .env; set +a; export AIDSSIST_REDIS_URL=''; export AIDSSIST_OBJECT_STORE_BACKEND=local; export AIDSSIST_S3_ENDPOINT_URL=''; export AIDSSIST_S3_ACCESS_KEY_ID=''; export AIDSSIST_S3_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY=''; ${workspaceFolder}/.venv/bin/uvicorn backend.aidssist_runtime.api:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000

tasks.label: Aidssist: Streamlit UI
tasks.command: set -a; source .env; set +a; export AIDSSIST_API_URL='http://127.0.0.1:8000'; export AIDSSIST_REDIS_URL=''; export AIDSSIST_OBJECT_STORE_BACKEND=local; export AIDSSIST_S3_ENDPOINT_URL=''; export AIDSSIST_S3_ACCESS_KEY_ID=''; export AIDSSIST_S3_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY=''; ${workspaceFolder}/.venv/bin/streamlit run frontend/app.py --server.address 127.0.0.1 --server.port 8501
